GHOST Document Ingestion Requirements
Document
  • VIEWS

  • Traceability
  • Deep Traceability

    • GHOST Document Ingestion Requirements

    UID: GHOST-DOCUMENT-INGESTION
    VERSION: 0.1

    1. 1. Purpose and Scope

    STATEMENT: This document defines the requirements for project-based document ingestion within GHOST Knowledge Management.

    The ingestion path converts raw project files into persistent dense and optional sparse chunk indexes plus a deterministic manifest ledger.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT
    1.1. Document Ingestion Scope
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PRODUCT-NAME Product and Package Naming Boundary
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-KM-PARENT Document Ingestion Knowledge Management Parent
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-BOUNDARY Ingestion Boundary
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-COMPONENTS Current Ingestion Components
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNK-IDENTITY Shared Dense/Sparse Chunk Identity
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DOCROOT Document Root
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHA256 Content Hash
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE Manifest Shape
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED Dense Branch
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD-FLAG Changed-Version Cleanup Switch
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-FLAG Tombstone Cleanup Switch
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STORE-SNAPSHOT Store Snapshot Capability
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SEQUENCE Ingestion Sequence
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONTROLLER Controller Integration
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON JSON Configuration Target
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-FAIL-LOUD Ingestion Failure Visibility
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PATH-BOUNDARY Project Path Boundary
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SOURCE-INTEGRITY Source Integrity
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LOG-CONTENT Ingestion Logging Content
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CODE-OWNERSHIP Ingestion Code Ownership
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SIBLING-BOUNDARY Sibling Ownership Boundary
    STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide deterministic project-based document ingestion that scans raw source files, detects content changes, creates stable overlapping chunks, generates dense and optional sparse representations, persists both branches, and publishes the current file manifest.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PRODUCT-NAME
    1.2. Product and Package Naming Boundary
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PRODUCT-NAME
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: The product described by this document shall be named GHOST.

    Current source paths may remain under the ragstream package namespace without redefining the product name.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-KM-PARENT
    1.3. Document Ingestion Knowledge Management Parent
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-KM-PARENT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: Document Ingestion shall be governed by the capability boundaries, shared artifacts, configuration governance, and sibling ownership defined in 40_knowledge_management.sdoc.

    This document shall refine the ingestion sub-capability without redefining the complete Knowledge Management flow.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-BOUNDARY
    1.4. Ingestion Boundary
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-BOUNDARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: Document ingestion shall prepare persistent project evidence stores.

    It shall not execute query-time retrieval, reranking, A3 selection, A4 condensation, memory ingestion, memory retrieval, or final prompt composition.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-COMPONENTS
    1.5. Current Ingestion Components
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-COMPONENTS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: The current ingestion capability shall be organized around DocumentLoader, IngestionManager, file-manifest utilities, Chunker, Embedder, SpladeEmbedder, VectorStoreChroma, and VectorStoreSplade.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNK-IDENTITY
    1.6. Shared Dense/Sparse Chunk Identity
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNK-IDENTITY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNKS Single Shared Chunking Pass
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STORE-INTEGRITY Store Alignment Integrity
    STATEMENT: Dense and sparse ingestion branches shall use the same ordered source chunks, stable chunk identifiers, and core metadata so their records can be aligned deterministically.

    2. 2. Project Source Discovery and Loading

    STATEMENT: The current raw-document model is a project subfolder beneath the configured doc_raw root.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DOCROOT
    2.1. Document Root
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DOCROOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-SUBFOLDER Project Subfolder
    STATEMENT: Document ingestion shall operate beneath an explicit existing document-root directory.

    Construction shall fail when the configured root does not exist or is not a directory.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-SUBFOLDER
    2.2. Project Subfolder
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-SUBFOLDER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DOCROOT Document Root
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RECURSIVE-SCAN Recursive File Discovery
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MISSING-PROJECT Missing Project Failure
    STATEMENT: One ingestion run shall target one named subfolder beneath the document root.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RECURSIVE-SCAN
    2.3. Recursive File Discovery
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RECURSIVE-SCAN
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-SUBFOLDER Project Subfolder
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CURRENT-FILE-TYPES Current Loader File-Type Behavior
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-UTF8 UTF-8 Loading
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LOADER-OUTPUT Loader Output Contract
    STATEMENT: DocumentLoader shall recursively discover regular files beneath the selected project subfolder.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MISSING-PROJECT
    2.4. Missing Project Failure
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MISSING-PROJECT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-SUBFOLDER Project Subfolder
    STATEMENT: Document loading shall fail explicitly when the selected project subfolder does not exist.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CURRENT-FILE-TYPES
    2.5. Current Loader File-Type Behavior
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CURRENT-FILE-TYPES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RECURSIVE-SCAN Recursive File Discovery
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-BINARY-CLAIM No Binary-Document Claim
    STATEMENT: The current DocumentLoader shall treat every discovered regular file as text regardless of extension.

    User-facing upload restrictions such as .txt and .md shall remain a GUI/controller import concern and shall not be falsely described as a loader-level extension filter.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-UTF8
    2.6. UTF-8 Loading
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-UTF8
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RECURSIVE-SCAN Recursive File Discovery
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LATIN1 Latin-1 Fallback
    STATEMENT: DocumentLoader shall first decode source files as UTF-8.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LATIN1
    2.7. Latin-1 Fallback
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LATIN1
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-UTF8 UTF-8 Loading
    STATEMENT: When UTF-8 decoding raises UnicodeDecodeError, DocumentLoader shall retry the file using Latin-1 decoding rather than aborting the complete scan for that decoding case.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LOADER-OUTPUT
    2.8. Loader Output Contract
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LOADER-OUTPUT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RECURSIVE-SCAN Recursive File Discovery
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RELATIVE-PATH Project-Relative Path Contract
    STATEMENT: DocumentLoader shall return absolute source-path strings paired with decoded file text for the selected project.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RELATIVE-PATH
    2.9. Project-Relative Path Contract
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RELATIVE-PATH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LOADER-OUTPUT Loader Output Contract
    STATEMENT: IngestionManager shall convert each loaded absolute path into a POSIX-style path relative to the document root for manifest records, chunk metadata, and stable identifiers.

    3. 3. File State, Hashing, and Manifest Ledger

    STATEMENT: The manifest is the deterministic ledger used to identify new, changed, unchanged, and removed project files.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHA256
    3.1. Content Hash
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHA256
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HASH-BYTES Byte-Based Hashing
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-FILE-RECORD Manifest File Record
    STATEMENT: GHOST shall calculate a SHA-256 digest from the source file bytes for every discovered file.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HASH-BYTES
    3.2. Byte-Based Hashing
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HASH-BYTES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHA256 Content Hash
    STATEMENT: Content hashes shall be computed from bytes read from disk and shall not be derived from decoded or normalized text.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-FILE-RECORD
    3.3. Manifest File Record
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-FILE-RECORD
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHA256 Content Hash
    STATEMENT: Each current file record shall contain project-relative path, SHA-256 digest, modification time, and byte size.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE
    3.4. Manifest Shape
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MISSING-MANIFEST Missing Manifest Behavior
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CORRUPT-MANIFEST Corrupt Manifest Failure
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-NORMALIZATION Manifest Key Normalization
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-PATH Manifest Match Key
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ATOMIC-MANIFEST Atomic Manifest Publication
    STATEMENT: The published manifest shall contain a version, generated-at timestamp, and a list of file records.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MISSING-MANIFEST
    3.5. Missing Manifest Behavior
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MISSING-MANIFEST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE Manifest Shape
    STATEMENT: When no prior manifest exists, manifest loading shall return a valid empty versioned manifest rather than failing.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CORRUPT-MANIFEST
    3.6. Corrupt Manifest Failure
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CORRUPT-MANIFEST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE Manifest Shape
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CORRUPT AC: Corrupt Manifest
    STATEMENT: Invalid manifest JSON shall fail explicitly and shall not be silently treated as an empty prior state.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-NORMALIZATION
    3.7. Manifest Key Normalization
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-NORMALIZATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE Manifest Shape
    STATEMENT: Manifest loading may restore missing version, timestamp, or files keys to documented defaults, but shall preserve valid existing file records.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-PATH
    3.8. Manifest Match Key
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-PATH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE Manifest Shape
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-NEW New File Classification
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-CHANGED Changed File Classification
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-UNCHANGED Unchanged File Classification
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-TOMBSTONE Tombstone Classification
    STATEMENT: Manifest comparison shall match current and previous records by project-relative path.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-NEW
    3.9. New File Classification
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-NEW
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-PATH Manifest Match Key
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-NEW AC: New File Ingestion
    STATEMENT: A current path absent from the prior manifest shall be classified for processing.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-CHANGED
    3.10. Changed File Classification
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-CHANGED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-PATH Manifest Match Key
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CHANGED AC: Changed File Version
    STATEMENT: A current path whose SHA-256 differs from the prior record shall be classified for processing.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-UNCHANGED
    3.11. Unchanged File Classification
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-UNCHANGED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-PATH Manifest Match Key
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-UNCHANGED AC: Unchanged File Skip
    STATEMENT: A current path whose SHA-256 equals the prior record shall be classified as unchanged and shall not be re-chunked or re-embedded in that run.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-TOMBSTONE
    3.12. Tombstone Classification
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-TOMBSTONE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-PATH Manifest Match Key
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-TOMBSTONE AC: Tombstone Policy
    STATEMENT: A prior manifest path absent from the current scan shall be classified as a tombstone.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ATOMIC-MANIFEST
    3.13. Atomic Manifest Publication
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ATOMIC-MANIFEST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-SHAPE Manifest Shape
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-PUBLISH-ORDER Manifest Publication Order
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-TRANSACTION-CLAIM No Whole-Run Transaction Claim
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-MANIFEST AC: Atomic Manifest
    STATEMENT: Manifest publication shall write a complete temporary JSON file and atomically replace the published manifest using the filesystem replace operation.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-PUBLISH-ORDER
    3.14. Manifest Publication Order
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-MANIFEST-PUBLISH-ORDER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ATOMIC-MANIFEST Atomic Manifest Publication
    STATEMENT: A new manifest shall be published only after the run has completed processing its target files and any enabled tombstone cleanup.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-TRANSACTION-CLAIM
    3.15. No Whole-Run Transaction Claim
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-TRANSACTION-CLAIM
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ATOMIC-MANIFEST Atomic Manifest Publication
    STATEMENT: Atomic manifest replacement shall not be described as a transactional rollback guarantee for dense or sparse store writes.

    The current stores may contain partial changes when a later operation in the run fails before manifest publication.

    4. 4. Chunking and Stable Identifier Contract

    STATEMENT: One shared deterministic chunking pass feeds all enabled document-representation branches.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER
    4.1. Overlapping Character Chunking
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-SIZE Positive Chunk Size
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-OVERLAP-NONNEG Non-Negative Overlap
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-OVERLAP-LT-SIZE Overlap Smaller than Chunk
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-TRIM Chunk Boundary Trimming
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-ORDER Chunk Order
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-FORMAT Stable Chunk Identifier
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HYDRATION-COMPAT Retrieval Hydration Compatibility
    STATEMENT: Chunker shall split decoded source text into sequential overlapping character windows.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-SIZE
    4.2. Positive Chunk Size
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-SIZE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    STATEMENT: The effective chunk size shall be a positive integer.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-OVERLAP-NONNEG
    4.3. Non-Negative Overlap
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-OVERLAP-NONNEG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    STATEMENT: The effective chunk overlap shall be non-negative.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-OVERLAP-LT-SIZE
    4.4. Overlap Smaller than Chunk
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-OVERLAP-LT-SIZE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    STATEMENT: The effective overlap shall be strictly smaller than the chunk size.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-TRIM
    4.5. Chunk Boundary Trimming
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-TRIM
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    STATEMENT: Each extracted window shall be trimmed and empty trimmed windows shall not become indexed chunks.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-ORDER
    4.6. Chunk Order
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-ORDER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    STATEMENT: Chunks shall preserve ascending source-window order and shall receive zero-based chunk indexes according to the emitted non-empty chunk list.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-FORMAT
    4.7. Stable Chunk Identifier
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-FORMAT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-VERSIONED Content-Versioned Identity
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-METADATA Chunk Metadata
    STATEMENT: Each chunk identifier shall be formed from project-relative path, source SHA-256, and chunk index using one deterministic shared format.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-VERSIONED
    4.8. Content-Versioned Identity
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-VERSIONED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-FORMAT Stable Chunk Identifier
    STATEMENT: A content change shall produce a new source hash and therefore a new stable identifier for every chunk of the changed file.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-METADATA
    4.9. Chunk Metadata
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-METADATA
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ID-FORMAT Stable Chunk Identifier
    STATEMENT: Each stored chunk representation shall include at least project-relative path, source SHA-256, chunk index, and source modification time.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNKS
    4.10. Single Shared Chunking Pass
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNKS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNK-IDENTITY Shared Dense/Sparse Chunk Identity
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-DENSE-SPARSE AC: Dense/Sparse Alignment
    STATEMENT: Dense and sparse branches shall consume the same chunk texts, identifiers, and metadata produced by one ingestion chunking pass.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HYDRATION-COMPAT
    4.11. Retrieval Hydration Compatibility
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HYDRATION-COMPAT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNKER Overlapping Character Chunking
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-PARAM-SINGLE-SOURCE Chunk Parameter Single Source
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-HYDRATION AC: Hydration Compatibility
    STATEMENT: The chunking parameters and index semantics used for ingestion shall be available to query-time hydration so the stored chunk index reconstructs the same source window.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-PARAM-SINGLE-SOURCE
    4.12. Chunk Parameter Single Source
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHUNK-PARAM-SINGLE-SOURCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HYDRATION-COMPAT Retrieval Hydration Compatibility
    STATEMENT: Chunk size and overlap shall be governed by one validated runtime-configuration source shared by ingestion, query splitting where intentionally aligned, and document hydration.

    Temporary duplicated code defaults shall be treated as migration debt.

    5. 5. Dense Embedding and Chroma Persistence

    STATEMENT: The dense branch is mandatory in the current ingestion path.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED
    5.1. Dense Branch
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-BATCH Dense Batch Embedding
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-EMPTY Empty Dense Input
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-KEY Embedding Provider Key
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-MODEL Dense Embedding Model
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-PERSIST Persistent Chroma Store
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-COUNT Dense Ingestion Counters
    STATEMENT: Every processed non-empty source file shall generate dense embeddings for its emitted chunk texts.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-BATCH
    5.2. Dense Batch Embedding
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-BATCH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED Dense Branch
    STATEMENT: The dense Embedder shall support embedding the file chunk texts in one batch call and shall return one vector per input text.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-EMPTY
    5.3. Empty Dense Input
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-EMPTY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED Dense Branch
    STATEMENT: An empty dense embedding input list shall return an empty vector list without a provider request.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-KEY
    5.4. Embedding Provider Key
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-KEY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED Dense Branch
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SECRET-BOUNDARY Secret Boundary
    STATEMENT: The current dense embedding implementation shall require an available OpenAI API key and shall fail explicitly when the key is unavailable.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-MODEL
    5.5. Dense Embedding Model
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-MODEL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED Dense Branch
    STATEMENT: The dense embedding model identifier shall be explicit and shall default to text-embedding-3-small until changed by approved configuration.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-PERSIST
    5.6. Persistent Chroma Store
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-PERSIST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED Dense Branch
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-TELEMETRY Chroma Telemetry Default
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-LENGTH Dense Store Length Validation
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-UPsert Dense Upsert Semantics
    STATEMENT: Dense vectors and metadata shall be upserted into a persistent Chroma collection under the active project store directory.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-TELEMETRY
    5.7. Chroma Telemetry Default
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-TELEMETRY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-PERSIST Persistent Chroma Store
    STATEMENT: The document Chroma store shall disable anonymized telemetry by default.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-LENGTH
    5.8. Dense Store Length Validation
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-LENGTH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-PERSIST Persistent Chroma Store
    STATEMENT: Dense store add operations shall reject mismatched identifier, vector, or metadata lengths.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-UPsert
    5.9. Dense Upsert Semantics
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-UPsert
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CHROMA-PERSIST Persistent Chroma Store
    STATEMENT: A repeated chunk identifier shall replace the stored vector and metadata for that identifier through upsert semantics.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-COUNT
    5.10. Dense Ingestion Counters
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-COUNT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-REQUIRED Dense Branch
    STATEMENT: Ingestion statistics shall expose dense vector upsert count and dense embedded-byte count.

    6. 6. Optional SPLADE Sparse Ingestion

    STATEMENT: The sparse branch is structurally parallel to the dense branch but optional.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL
    6.1. Optional Sparse Branch
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PAIR Paired Sparse Dependencies
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DOC-ENCODE Document-Side Sparse Encoding
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-EMPTY Empty Sparse Input
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-REP Sparse Representation
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-MODEL Sparse Model Baseline
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DEVICE Sparse Device Baseline
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DIMS Sparse Active-Dimension Cap
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PERSIST Persistent Sparse Store
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-COUNT Sparse Ingestion Counters
    STATEMENT: SPLADE sparse ingestion shall execute only when both a sparse store and sparse embedder are supplied for the run.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PAIR
    6.2. Paired Sparse Dependencies
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PAIR
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-SPARSE-PAIR AC: Sparse Pair Validation
    STATEMENT: Supplying only one of sparse store or sparse embedder shall fail explicitly rather than silently running a partial sparse branch.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DOC-ENCODE
    6.3. Document-Side Sparse Encoding
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DOC-ENCODE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    STATEMENT: SpladeEmbedder.embed shall use the document-side sparse encoder and shall return one sparse representation per input chunk text.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-EMPTY
    6.4. Empty Sparse Input
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-EMPTY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    STATEMENT: An empty sparse embedding input list shall return an empty result.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-REP
    6.5. Sparse Representation
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-REP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    STATEMENT: Each sparse representation shall be a mapping from normalized vocabulary-dimension identifiers to non-zero floating-point weights.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-MODEL
    6.6. Sparse Model Baseline
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-MODEL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    STATEMENT: The current sparse model shall default to naver/splade-cocondenser-ensembledistil until changed by approved configuration.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DEVICE
    6.7. Sparse Device Baseline
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DEVICE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    STATEMENT: The current sparse encoder shall default to CPU execution until changed by approved configuration.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DIMS
    6.8. Sparse Active-Dimension Cap
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-DIMS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    STATEMENT: The sparse encoder may cap active dimensions per vector; the effective cap shall be configurable and observable.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PERSIST
    6.9. Persistent Sparse Store
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PERSIST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-LENGTH Sparse Store Length Validation
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-NORMALIZE Sparse Vector Normalization
    STATEMENT: Sparse vectors and metadata shall be persisted in the active project sparse store using atomic replacement of the serialized bundle file.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-LENGTH
    6.10. Sparse Store Length Validation
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-LENGTH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PERSIST Persistent Sparse Store
    STATEMENT: Sparse store add operations shall reject mismatched identifier, vector, or metadata lengths.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-NORMALIZE
    6.11. Sparse Vector Normalization
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-NORMALIZE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PERSIST Persistent Sparse Store
    STATEMENT: Sparse persistence shall normalize keys to strings, values to floats, and shall omit zero-weight dimensions.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-COUNT
    6.12. Sparse Ingestion Counters
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-COUNT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-OPTIONAL Optional Sparse Branch
    STATEMENT: Ingestion statistics shall expose sparse vector upsert count and sparse embedded-byte count when the branch executes.

    7. 7. Version Cleanup, Tombstones, and Store Maintenance

    STATEMENT: Changed-file cleanup and removed-file cleanup are explicit independent policies.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD-FLAG
    7.1. Changed-Version Cleanup Switch
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD-FLAG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD Changed-Version Cleanup
    STATEMENT: The ingestion run shall expose an explicit delete_old_versions policy and the current default shall be enabled.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD
    7.2. Changed-Version Cleanup
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD-FLAG Changed-Version Cleanup Switch
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD-ORDER Current Changed-Version Cleanup Order
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-FILTER Version Delete Filter
    STATEMENT: When changed-version cleanup is enabled and the prior hash differs, all dense and enabled sparse records matching the prior path/hash pair shall be deleted.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD-ORDER
    7.3. Current Changed-Version Cleanup Order
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD-ORDER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD Changed-Version Cleanup
    STATEMENT: The current implementation shall perform prior-version deletion before writing the new dense and optional sparse representations for that file.

    This order and its failure implications shall remain visible until changed by an approved coordinated requirement/code update.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-FLAG
    7.4. Tombstone Cleanup Switch
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-FLAG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-DELETE Tombstone Cleanup
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-PRESERVE Default Tombstone Preservation
    STATEMENT: The ingestion run shall expose an explicit delete_tombstones policy and the current default shall be disabled.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-DELETE
    7.5. Tombstone Cleanup
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-DELETE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-FLAG Tombstone Cleanup Switch
    STATEMENT: When tombstone cleanup is enabled, all dense and enabled sparse records matching each removed file path/hash pair shall be deleted.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-PRESERVE
    7.6. Default Tombstone Preservation
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-PRESERVE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-TOMBSTONE-FLAG Tombstone Cleanup Switch
    STATEMENT: When tombstone cleanup is disabled, the new manifest may omit the removed file while prior vector-store entries remain until a later cleanup operation.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-FILTER
    7.7. Version Delete Filter
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-FILTER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DELETE-OLD Changed-Version Cleanup
    STATEMENT: File-version deletion shall match both project-relative path and source SHA-256.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STORE-SNAPSHOT
    7.8. Store Snapshot Capability
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STORE-SNAPSHOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SNAPSHOT-NONOVERWRITE Snapshot Non-Overwrite
    STATEMENT: Dense and sparse stores shall support creation of timestamped filesystem snapshots of their project persistence directories.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SNAPSHOT-NONOVERWRITE
    7.9. Snapshot Non-Overwrite
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SNAPSHOT-NONOVERWRITE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STORE-SNAPSHOT Store Snapshot Capability
    STATEMENT: A snapshot operation shall not silently overwrite an existing snapshot directory with the same resolved name.

    8. 8. Ingestion Orchestration and Statistics

    STATEMENT: IngestionManager owns the current run sequence and aggregate result counters.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SEQUENCE
    8.1. Ingestion Sequence
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SEQUENCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-UNCHANGED-SKIP Unchanged File Skip
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-CHUNKS No-Chunk File Behavior
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-EMBED-BYTES Embedded Byte Accounting
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS Ingestion Statistics Contract
    STATEMENT: One ingestion run shall perform source loading, current-record construction, prior-manifest diff, changed/new file processing, optional tombstone cleanup, manifest publication, and statistics return in that order.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-UNCHANGED-SKIP
    8.2. Unchanged File Skip
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-UNCHANGED-SKIP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SEQUENCE Ingestion Sequence
    STATEMENT: Files classified unchanged shall not be re-chunked, re-embedded, or upserted during that run.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-CHUNKS
    8.3. No-Chunk File Behavior
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-CHUNKS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SEQUENCE Ingestion Sequence
    STATEMENT: A processed file whose chunking result contains no non-empty chunks shall contribute no embeddings or vectors for that file.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-EMBED-BYTES
    8.4. Embedded Byte Accounting
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-EMBED-BYTES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SEQUENCE Ingestion Sequence
    STATEMENT: Embedded-byte counters shall be calculated from UTF-8 byte lengths of emitted chunk texts and shall be recorded separately for dense and sparse branches.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS
    8.5. Ingestion Statistics Contract
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SEQUENCE Ingestion Sequence
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS-IMMUTABLE Immutable Statistics Result
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-STATS AC: Statistics Consistency
    STATEMENT: IngestionStats shall expose scanned files, files to process, unchanged files, tombstones, chunks added, total vector upserts, changed-version deletions, tombstone deletions, published manifest path, total embedded bytes, and dense/sparse branch counters.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS-IMMUTABLE
    8.6. Immutable Statistics Result
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS-IMMUTABLE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS Ingestion Statistics Contract
    STATEMENT: The returned ingestion statistics object shall be immutable after construction.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONTROLLER
    8.7. Controller Integration
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONTROLLER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-STORES Project Store Separation
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RETURN Controller Result Projection
    STATEMENT: The controller shall create project directories and instantiate the current loader/manager, dense store, sparse store, chunker, dense embedder, and sparse embedder before invoking ingestion.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-STORES
    8.8. Project Store Separation
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PROJECT-STORES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONTROLLER Controller Integration
    STATEMENT: Each project shall use separate raw-document, Chroma, SPLADE, and manifest paths under their configured roots.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RETURN
    8.9. Controller Result Projection
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-RETURN
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONTROLLER Controller Integration
    STATEMENT: The controller may project IngestionStats into a serializable result and add project paths and import information for the interface layer.

    9. 9. Configuration Governance

    STATEMENT: Ingestion quality and retrievability depend on consistent externally governed operational parameters.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON
    9.1. JSON Configuration Target
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-FIELDS Ingestion Configuration Fields
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-CONSISTENCY Chunk Configuration Consistency
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-CURRENT Current Baseline Defaults
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-NO-FALSE-CLAIM No False Configuration Claim
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-VERSION Configuration Version Traceability
    STATEMENT: Document-ingestion tuning parameters shall be migrated to versioned JSON runtime configuration.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-FIELDS
    9.2. Ingestion Configuration Fields
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-FIELDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON JSON Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: The ingestion configuration target shall include chunk size, overlap, dense model, sparse model, sparse device/backend/batch/dimension cap, sparse enablement, changed-version cleanup, tombstone cleanup, project-root policies, and supported source-type policy.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-CONSISTENCY
    9.3. Chunk Configuration Consistency
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-CONSISTENCY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON JSON Configuration Target
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CONFIG AC: Configured Chunking
    STATEMENT: The effective chunk size and overlap used during ingestion shall match the values used to reconstruct source chunks during retrieval hydration.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-CURRENT
    9.4. Current Baseline Defaults
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-CURRENT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON JSON Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: Until configuration migration is complete, the current baseline shall remain 1200 characters with 120-character overlap, text-embedding-3-small for dense embeddings, and the implemented SPLADE defaults.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-NO-FALSE-CLAIM
    9.5. No False Configuration Claim
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-NO-FALSE-CLAIM
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON JSON Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: A default still supplied by a Python function or constructor shall not be described as controlled by runtime_config.json until the value is actually read and enforced from that file.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-VERSION
    9.6. Configuration Version Traceability
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-VERSION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-JSON JSON Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: The effective ingestion-configuration version shall be traceable to the generated project indexes and manifest publication event.

    10. 10. Error Handling, Security, and Quality Boundaries

    STATEMENT: The ingestion path processes project files and external model calls and must preserve data and evidence integrity.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-FAIL-LOUD
    10.1. Ingestion Failure Visibility
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-FAIL-LOUD
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: Missing roots, missing project folders, invalid manifest JSON, invalid chunking values, missing API keys, paired sparse dependency errors, embedding failures, and persistence failures shall remain observable and shall not be reported as successful ingestion.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PATH-BOUNDARY
    10.2. Project Path Boundary
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-PATH-BOUNDARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: Project names and source paths shall be constrained so ingestion cannot intentionally escape the configured document-root hierarchy.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SOURCE-INTEGRITY
    10.3. Source Integrity
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SOURCE-INTEGRITY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: Ingestion shall read source files and shall not rewrite their original content as part of hashing, chunking, embedding, or indexing.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STORE-INTEGRITY
    10.4. Store Alignment Integrity
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STORE-INTEGRITY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNK-IDENTITY Shared Dense/Sparse Chunk Identity
    STATEMENT: Dense and sparse branch records for one chunk identifier shall refer to the same source path, hash, chunk index, and chunking configuration.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SECRET-BOUNDARY
    10.5. Secret Boundary
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SECRET-BOUNDARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DENSE-KEY Embedding Provider Key
    STATEMENT: Embedding-provider credentials shall be obtained from approved environment or secret-management facilities and shall not be persisted in manifests, vector metadata, or requirement artifacts.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LOG-CONTENT
    10.6. Ingestion Logging Content
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-LOG-CONTENT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: Ingestion logs shall prefer paths, counts, hashes, model identifiers, and error context over full document contents.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-BINARY-CLAIM
    10.7. No Binary-Document Claim
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-BINARY-CLAIM
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CURRENT-FILE-TYPES Current Loader File-Type Behavior
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-NO-BINARY AC: Text-Loader Truth
    STATEMENT: The current text loader shall not be represented as a parser for PDF, DOCX, images, archives, or other structured binary formats merely because it scans all file extensions.

    11. 11. Traceability and Acceptance Criteria

    STATEMENT: These criteria verify ingestion behavior and its dependency contracts.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CODE-OWNERSHIP
    11.1. Ingestion Code Ownership
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CODE-OWNERSHIP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-SYNC AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
    STATEMENT: DocumentLoader, IngestionManager, file-manifest utilities, Chunker, dense/sparse embedders, and dense/sparse document stores shall map to the deepest applicable UIDs in this document.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
    11.2. Sibling Ownership Boundary
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ROOT Document Ingestion Scope
    STATEMENT: Query-time retrieval and reranking shall remain owned by 42; A3/A4 shall remain owned by 43; memory ingestion shall remain outside this document.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-NEW
    11.3. AC: New File Ingestion
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-NEW
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-NEW New File Classification
    STATEMENT: Given a new readable project file, the run shall create its current record, chunks, stable identifiers, dense vectors, optional sparse vectors, metadata, and published manifest entry.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-UNCHANGED
    11.4. AC: Unchanged File Skip
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-UNCHANGED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-UNCHANGED Unchanged File Classification
    STATEMENT: Given an unchanged file with the same path and SHA-256, the run shall classify it unchanged and shall not add new vectors for it.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CHANGED
    11.5. AC: Changed File Version
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CHANGED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-CHANGED Changed File Classification
    STATEMENT: Given a file whose content hash changed, the run shall create new hash-based chunk identifiers and, when enabled, remove records for the prior path/hash version.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-TOMBSTONE
    11.6. AC: Tombstone Policy
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-TOMBSTONE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-DIFF-TOMBSTONE Tombstone Classification
    STATEMENT: Given a prior manifest record missing from disk, the run shall classify a tombstone and shall delete its stored version only when tombstone cleanup is enabled.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-DENSE-SPARSE
    11.7. AC: Dense/Sparse Alignment
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-DENSE-SPARSE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SHARED-CHUNKS Single Shared Chunking Pass
    STATEMENT: Given both ingestion branches enabled, the dense and sparse stores shall receive equal ordered identifier lists and matching metadata for the shared chunk texts.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-SPARSE-PAIR
    11.8. AC: Sparse Pair Validation
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-SPARSE-PAIR
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-SPARSE-PAIR Paired Sparse Dependencies
    STATEMENT: Given only one sparse dependency, ingestion shall fail before publishing a successful manifest for the run.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-MANIFEST
    11.9. AC: Atomic Manifest
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-MANIFEST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-ATOMIC-MANIFEST Atomic Manifest Publication
    STATEMENT: Given a completed successful run, the published manifest shall be valid complete JSON and no temporary file shall remain as the authoritative manifest.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CORRUPT
    11.10. AC: Corrupt Manifest
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CORRUPT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CORRUPT-MANIFEST Corrupt Manifest Failure
    STATEMENT: Given malformed prior manifest JSON, ingestion shall report failure and shall not silently rebuild from an assumed empty manifest.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-HYDRATION
    11.11. AC: Hydration Compatibility
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-HYDRATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-HYDRATION-COMPAT Retrieval Hydration Compatibility
    STATEMENT: For every indexed chunk, applying the recorded source path, chunk index, and effective chunk parameters to the unchanged source file shall reconstruct the indexed text window.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-STATS
    11.12. AC: Statistics Consistency
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-STATS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-STATS Ingestion Statistics Contract
    STATEMENT: The returned branch and total counters shall equal the actual chunks processed, vectors upserted, bytes embedded, and records deleted during the run.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-NO-BINARY
    11.13. AC: Text-Loader Truth
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-NO-BINARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-NO-BINARY-CLAIM No Binary-Document Claim
    STATEMENT: A structured binary file placed in the project folder shall not be claimed as correctly parsed unless a dedicated approved loader exists for that format.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CONFIG
    11.14. AC: Configured Chunking
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-CONFIG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CONFIG-CONSISTENCY Chunk Configuration Consistency
    STATEMENT: After JSON migration, changing the configured chunk size or overlap shall change ingestion and hydration consistently without requiring separate Python constant edits.
    GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-SYNC
    11.15. AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
    UID: GHOST-DOC-INGEST-AC-SYNC
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-DOC-INGEST-CODE-OWNERSHIP Ingestion Code Ownership
    STATEMENT: An ingestion baseline shall not be accepted when source discovery, hashing, manifest semantics, chunk identity, branch alignment, cleanup policy, or configuration authority contradicts this document.
    Built with StrictDoc 0.25.0
